test_cases.name: add-collection-and-generate
test_cases.description: Add a new collection and run type/config generation
test_cases.prompt: Add a new 'reviews' collection to libs/example-config/src/collections/ with fields: title (text, required), body (richText), rating (number, min 1 max 5, required), and a relationship to the 'products' collection called 'product'. Export it from the collections barrel file (libs/example-config/src/collections/index.ts). Then run type generation so the generated types file reflects the new collection.

assertions._comment: Must use Momentum collection builder functions
Collection slug must match file name convention
Must use richText and relationship field builders, not raw objects
Generated types must include the new Reviews interface with rating field

test_cases.name: migration-generate-workflow
test_cases.description: Generate a migration after adding a collection field
test_cases.prompt: Add a new 'featured' checkbox field and a 'publishedAt' date field to the existing articles collection at libs/example-config/src/collections/articles.collection.ts. Then run the full migration workflow: generate types (nx run example-angular:generate), then generate a migration (nx run example-angular:migrate:generate). Do NOT run the migration — just generate it.

assertions._comment: Fields must be added to the collection
Must use typed field builders (checkbox for boolean, date) not raw objects
Generated types must reflect the new fields
Must import field builders from core, not define raw field objects
A migration file should have been generated in the project root migrations dir

test_cases.name: check-migration-status
test_cases.description: Check migration status and explain the output
test_cases.prompt: Run the migration status command for the example-angular app (nx run example-angular:migrate:status) and create a markdown summary file at docs/migration-status.md that documents: 1) The current migration status output. 2) How many migrations are pending vs applied. 3) What the next step would be (run or generate). This is a documentation task — do NOT run any migrations, just check status and document it.

assertions._comment: Must distinguish between pending and applied migrations
Must reference the correct Nx command format, not raw CLI

changes: Initial three-tier eval definitions for migrations skill
3 test cases: add collection + generate types, migration generate workflow, status check
Convention tier tests: @momentumcms/core imports, field builders, generated types, Nx commands
Quality tier: nx lint on modified projects
Fixed eval_bug: boolean( -> checkbox( (the actual field builder name in @momentumcms/core)
Fixed eval_bug: migration glob apps/example-angular/migrations/*.ts -> migrations/*.ts (migrations go to project root)
Fixed prompt: 'boolean field' -> 'checkbox field' to match actual builder name
Removed spurious path_alt that pointed to the same file
